data.body:
E6.5a COMPLETE (6/6) — all in-process->engine subprocess deps severed, committed to local main:
1. composer alias-compute -> rebar.reducer._alias (11c0784e)
2. resolver alias/jira_key scan in-process (8af1ebf7)
3. link --dry-run preview in-process (60a4e31a)
4. transition archived->open un-archive via revert_core (0a03fd45)
5. bridge-fsck -> rebar._engine_support.bridge_fsck; engine file is now a shim; rebar.bridge_fsck()+MCP+_cli arm in-process (e15907dd)
6. bridge-probe -> sys.executable launch (no dispatcher); LIVE-DIG validated all 6 steps + self-cleanup (656958a1)

MILESTONE: rebar._run and _cli._passthrough are now DEAD (unrouted known-subcommands = []). The in-process CLI no longer touches the bash dispatcher. Engine reached only by reconciler/probe subprocesses (sys.executable+engine_env) and the bash test suites. E7 (delete dispatcher+engine+shims) is unblocked.
